falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom featured a 12% drawdown with recovery capped below prior highs; a new all-time high would break the structural similarity and suggest this is not a comparable accumulation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained sub-14 VIX contradicts the bottom_2024_aug analog which maintained elevated volatility (VIX 16-28) for 3+ weeks post-low; this would signal complacency inconsistent with a genuine bottom formation and suggest the current signal is a bear trap or false breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and DXY simultaneously breaks above 105.50
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination reverses the current macro driver (growth scare with sticky inflation/rates); the August 2024 bottom occurred with yields falling on recession fears, so a flight-to-safety bid in bonds with dollar strength would indicate a different regime (hard landing) rather than the soft-landing/pause pattern being matched

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
